name: Sharpen the Blade
stimulus: Race sharpening. Shorter, faster reps. Hill sprints in warmups. Taper week 3. A-race 5K June 14.

planned.desc:
Zwift — moderate ride

70min Z2:
- Include 3x2min Z3
- Final speed block. Stay fresh.
planned.notes: Easy bike to start the week.

planned.desc:
TRACK — race simulation

WU: 2km easy + drills + 4x10sec hill sprint (any incline — MAXIMAL)

3km time trial @ 3:28-3:32/km:
- Even pace. Don't go out in 3:20.
- This is your dress rehearsal

5min full recovery (walk/jog)

3x400m @ 76-78sec (3:10-3:15/km)
- 90sec jog recovery
- Practice closing speed

CD: 2km easy
planned.notes: Hill sprints fire up the nervous system. Then RACE the 3km. Get a time.

planned.desc:
AM: Easy spin 40min Z1
PM: Strength 35min (maintenance)

Strength:
- Jump squats 3x4
- Single-leg hops 3x6/leg
- Core circuit 2 rounds
- Light and snappy — no fatigue
planned.notes: Maintenance. Keep the nervous system sharp.

planned.desc:
Threshold + speed

WU: 2km easy + 4x100m strides

SET 1 — Threshold: 2x2km @ 3:55-4:05/km
- 3min jog recovery between
- Controlled, rhythmic breathing

SET 2 — Speed: 4x200m @ 37-39sec (3:05-3:15/km)
- 200m walk recovery
- Quick feet, relaxed upper body

CD: 2km easy
planned.notes: Threshold builds race stamina. 200s keep the top-end alive.

planned.desc:
Zwift race — short crit format

20-30min race:
- Go hard
- Practice surging and recovering
- Race mentality: don't sit in, attack
+ 15min WU, 10min CD
planned.notes: Racing is a skill. Practice it.

planned.desc:
Long run — last big one

Segment 1: 12km @ 5:00/km
Segment 2: 3km @ 4:30-4:35/km
Segment 3: 2km @ 4:15-4:20/km
Segment 4: 1km @ 4:00/km (CLOSING SPEED)

Total: 18km
Prove you can close hard when tired
planned.notes: Last long run. Finish fast. That's the whole point.

planned.desc:
Long ride — easy

2.5hrs Z2:
- Outdoor, scenic route
- No effort, just enjoy
- Recovery from long run

Easy spin

60min Z1-Z2:
- Flat, easy
- Freshen up for track

TRACK — pure speed

WU: 2km easy + drills + 4x10sec hill sprint (SNAP)

MAIN: 8x400m @ 78-80sec (3:15-3:20/km)
- 200m jog recovery (keep under 90sec)
- RELAX: drop shoulders, unclench hands
- These should feel FAST but smooth

CD: 2km easy
planned.notes: Hill sprints wake up fast-twitch. Then SPEED. Relax your face.

planned.desc:
AM: Easy spin 30min Z1
PM: Strength 30min — LAST SESSION

Strength:
- Bounds 3x6
- Plyo lunges 3x8
- Core circuit 2 rounds
- This is it. Light and fast.
planned.notes: Last strength session of the cycle.

planned.desc:
Race-pace lock-in

WU: 2km easy + 4x100m strides

2km @ 3:28-3:30/km (5K race pace)
- This should feel FAMILIAR now
- Even breathing, relaxed stride

3min jog

1km @ 3:22-3:25/km (slightly faster)
- This is your kick pace

CD: 2km easy
planned.notes: Feel race pace. Lock it in your body. This is what 17:15 feels like.

planned.desc:
Easy spin

45min Z1:
- Short, easy
- Taper starting
planned.notes: Less volume now. Trust the fitness.

planned.desc:
Reduced long run

12km @ 5:00-5:10/km
- All easy
- No fast finish
- Just comfortable running
planned.notes: Taper long run. Shorter. No heroics.

planned.desc:
Easy ride

90min Z2:
- Outdoor, enjoy
- Stay loose

Easy spin

45min Z1:
- Short and easy
- Don't overthink race week

TRACK — final sharpener

WU: 2km easy + drills + 4x10sec hill sprint (EXPLOSIVE)

MAIN: 4x200m @ 36-38sec (3:00-3:10/km)
- 200m walk recovery
- SHORT. FAST. DONE.

+ 2x400m @ 78sec (3:15/km)
- 200m jog recovery

CD: 2km easy

Leave speed in the legs. Not fatigue.
planned.notes: Last hard session. SHORT and SHARP. You should feel FAST not tired.

planned.desc:
Yoga — gentle

25min:
- Light movement
- Hip openers
- Breathing
- Visualization

Easy spin

30min Z1:
- Just move
- Stay off your feet otherwise

Pre-race shakeout

3km easy jog
+ 4x100m strides (smooth, not maximal)
+ 2x200m @ 3:28/km (race pace — feel it)

That's it. Done. Go home.
planned.notes: Touch race pace. Sleep by 10pm. Lay out kit. Set 2 alarms.

planned.desc:
A-RACE: 5K

WU (45min before gun):
- 2km easy jog
- Dynamic drills
- 4x100m strides (building to race pace)
- 2x200m @ 3:28/km
- Stay warm until start

RACE PLAN:
- km 1: 3:28-3:30 (PATIENCE — don't go 3:20)
- km 2: 3:28
- km 3: 3:28 (halfway — check in, stay relaxed)
- km 4: 3:26-3:28 (start building)
- km 5: EVERYTHING (3:20-3:25 if you can)

Target: 17:15 (stretch: sub-17:00)

CD: 2km easy jog
planned.notes: THIS IS YOUR DAY. Even splits. Don't panic if km1 is 3:32. Stay patient. Attack km 4-5. You've done the work.

planned.desc:
REST

Celebrate.

Rate the race 1-10.
What worked? What didn't?

If sub-17:30: 10K block next.
If not: adjust and try again in 4 weeks.
planned.notes: You did it. Whatever the time says.
